## Offline Documentation

This file embeds the English component guide, API, FAQ, and version documentation. Treat the content below as the bundled documentation source for ordinary RTDF projects that only install the npm `rtdf` package.

## guide

## Description

The Placeholder component is used to occupy a space and can be used to represent some content in this space.

## api

## Placeholder Props

| Name     | Type                                                             | Default  | Required | Description              |
| -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | -------- | ------------------------ |
| py       | `'0'\|'1'\|'2'\|'3'\|'4'\|'8'`                                   | `'4'`    | N        | Vertical padding.        |
| height   | `'full'\|'1'\|'2'\|'4'\|'8'\|'16'\|'24'\|'32'\|'48'\|'64'\|'96'` | `'full'` | N        | Height.                  |
| radius   | `'none'\|'sm'\|'md'\|'lg'\|'xl'\|'2xl'\|'3xl'\|'4xl'\|''` | `''`     | N        | Border radius style.     |
| shadow   | `'none'\|'xs'\|'sm'\|'md'\|'lg'\|'xl'\|'2xl'`                    | `'none'` | N        | Shadow style.            |
| injClass | `string`                                                         | `''`     | N        | Injected CSS class name. |

## Placeholder Children

| Name     | Type                                                                | Parameters | Description          |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | -------------------- |
| children | ReactNode | -          | Placeholder content. |
